'''Titi Chronelle''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]].

==Biography==
Unlike [[Elza Monimi]] and [[Hala]], he managed to avoid being captured by [[Krayn]]'s [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] raid in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] approximately two years before the Battle of Naboo. After the raid, he explained to [[Amee/Legends|Amee]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] what had transpired, as the two children had been having a picnic outside the settlement at the time.

{{Char-stub}}
